name: openclaw
_comment: VERIFIED 2026-07-08 against OpenClaw 2026.3.11 (macOS) via scripts/verify_harness.py — the woken agent read the briefing and echoed the canary token. The explicit --session-id is required: without it `openclaw agent` exits 1 asking for --to/--session-id/--agent. Ships enabled:false so copying the file is never enough to spend money by accident.
command: You were woken by ZugaMind, a cognition sidecar. Read the file at {briefing_file} and act on what it asks.
